description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Learning Management product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Import And Export).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Learning Management.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Learning Management accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 6.5 (Confidentiality impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N).
